rag_reference.query: GPU queue saturation and throughput metrics

refinement_overlap.overlap: Direct. The benchmark is max_tokens=1, so it is effectively prefill-only; server TTFT/e2e/prefill metrics and compact prompts target this.
Partial. vLLM prefix caching is enabled and static scenarios exercise shared prompts; the current app does not yet implement a prefix tree or persistent document-prefix KV reuse.
refinement_overlap.refinement: KV cache, prefix caching, and reusing computed data

refinement_overlap.overlap: Direct. The matrix samples nvidia-smi during load for GPU utilization, memory used, and power draw in addition to vLLM MFU.
refinement_overlap.refinement: Hardware utilization, GPU power, GPU memory

refinement_overlap.overlap: Direct for data-parallel balancing across 1 vs 6 replicas and concurrent-user scenarios; not yet single-document parallel merge.
refinement_overlap.refinement: Batch size, continuous batching, balancing across chips

refinement_overlap.overlap: Measured but not implemented. Dynamic/static and single/multi scenarios expose queue/prefill behavior; JCT-aware scheduling remains a next optimization.
